creator: hirner@bitfire.at
text:
(In reply to Ultima from comment #1)

I suggest that users with FreeBSD <10.1 use the non-port TeamSpeak (or software that is availabe open-source, like Mumble, if this is an option).

I wouldn't keep a bunch of old (and vulnerable) TeamSpeak versions in the ports repo (if that is what you mean by slave port).
